title: The bottom line.
points: Release planned for July 1st, with a gradual rollout to customers.
Part of the AI Work Platform — not a new product.
Completes the vision: agents and people as one team.
Marketing focus: collaboration and AI ecosystem connectivity.
monday has always been the place where people come together to get work done and achieve their business outcomes. Now — they do it side-by-side with agents that multiply their output.
